# Model definition
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPVisionModel, CLIPProcessor, CLIPConfig

class SatelliteClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=62):
        super().__init__()
        # Use CLIP Vision model as backbone
        clip_vision_model = CLIPVisionModel.from_pretrained('openai/clip-vit-base-patch16')
        
        # Extract only the vision components
        self.clip_vision_model = clip_vision_model.vision_model
        self.post_layernorm = clip_vision_model.post_layernorm
        
        # Add classification head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(clip_vision_model.config.hidden_size, num_classes)
        )
        
    def forward(self, x):
        # Get features from CLIP vision encoder
        outputs = self.clip_vision_model(pixel_values=x)
        sequence_output = outputs.last_hidden_state
        
        # Apply post-layernorm
        pooled_output = self.post_layernorm(sequence_output[:, 0, :])  # Take [CLS] token
        
        logits = self.classifier(pooled_output)
        return logits
